sections.changelog:
0.4.0

  • Fix: updater force-check now works in network admin (adds manage_network_plugins capability check)
  • Fix: Check for Updates button also clears WordPress update_plugins transient, so the update notification appears immediately
  • Add: Settings page now appears under Network Admin → Settings so super admins can trigger update checks without leaving network admin
  • Add: Check for Updates button uses nonce and shows Go to Updates link when a newer version is found

0.3.9

  • Fix: featured_media now returns post's own positive ID so SearchIQ recognises an image exists
  • Fix: rest_pre_dispatch intercepts /wp/v2/media/{id} for stub posts and returns synthetic media response with source_url
  • Fix: wp_get_attachment_image_src filter now matches by post type instead of negative ID sign
  • Add: siq-styles.php — min-height on .siq-blogrfct-facet, object-fit cover on result images, hides empty image placeholder boxes

0.3.8

  • Add: pg_artist taxonomy (flat) — artist/stylist name, SearchIQ Author-facet equivalent
  • Add: pg_content_type taxonomy (hierarchical) — portrait/workspace/before-after/product-shot/team-culture/promotional/client-spotlight
  • Add: sync-image endpoint accepts optional artist and content_type fields

0.3.7

  • Add: configure-site now accepts searchiq_api_key — writes _siq_authentication_code + seed _siq_raw_settings (domain, facets, post types) so SearchIQ activates without manual key entry
  • Add: pg_setup_gallery_page now inserts [searchiq] above [pg_gallery] when SearchIQ is configured; re-running configure-site syncs the page content

0.3.6

  • Fix: updater uses plugin_basename (no hardcoded path), drops null failure caching, adds admin_init force-check, stores last error in site options, adds Test Metadata Fetch button in Settings

0.3.5

  • Add: [pg_gallery] live search + tag-chip facets

0.3.4

  • Fix: updater now caches metadata (1 hr), clears on Check Again, and removes stale no_update entries
